final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement mockup for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, designed as a brand-exposure campaign visual with maximum visual impact.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout, no UI chrome, ad fills edge-to-edge
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic backdrop that amplifies brand presence — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with OPPO brand identity — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must be formatted as a phone screenshot at 1080×1920 pixels, portrait orientation, full-bleed ad layout
Avoid: must avoid realistic OS UI elements (status bar, navigation bar, notification shade)
